description: Enact FGAP-042: the roadmap becomes a derived view over milestone_precedes_milestone. Register the relation_type (live config + catalog, dual-surface); author the 8 ordering edges over MILE-001..009 (the user-validated lane DAG — three starts, two joins; the chain language of FGAP-042 generalized to the DAG per the approved plan's D1 delta); rewire roadmap-plan.ts from the never-registered roadmap.json/phase_depends_on design to the milestone-chain derivation (loadRoadmap(cwd) — no id, no block, no file; validateRoadmap with endpoint/cycle/positioning codes and a non-status-flipping isolated info; renderRoadmap edges-only); ops -load/-render/-validate keep names with empty params, -list retires; build-html-views gains the derived roadmap section; legacy registry/schemas/roadmap.schema.json deleted; dangling DEC-0012 citations replaced with FGAP-042.
acceptance_criteria: milestone_precedes_milestone (ordering, milestone→milestone, modeled on decision_supersedes_decision) registered in live config AND samples/conception.json; catalog count assertions updated; a fresh accept-all substrate carries it.
The 8 precedes edges filed (003→004, 004→001, 001→002, 003→006, 004→007, 005→007, 003→009, 005→009); context-validate and context-validate-relations clean after.

pi-context context-roadmap-render on the live substrate outputs MILE-003,005,008,004,006,009,001,007,002 with per-milestone derived status, phase sections, task tables, and Preceded-by lines sourced strictly from edges (MILE-008 shows none).

context-roadmap-validate on the live substrate: clean, with only the MILE-008 isolated info finding; each error code (endpoint-missing, cycle, milestone-missing) demonstrated on scratch fixtures; info never flips status.

context-roadmap-load returns the structured MilestoneRoadmapView; context-roadmap-list and the roadmap-list subcommand are gone; no roadmap.json exists anywhere in the repo; registry/schemas/roadmap.schema.json deleted.
roadmap-plan.test.ts: pure suites unchanged; rewired fixtures cover empty-view, linear chain, the live-shaped DAG verbatim, cycles, all validation codes; full workspace suite 0 failures.
build-html-views renders the derived roadmap section from the same view; the hand-authored milestones-and-roadmap.html is untouched.

Docs-surface-sync: op description strings, both READMEs' roadmap family, skill-narrative if it names roadmap ops, SKILL regen, CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entries in pi-context and pi-agent-dispatch (D1 generalization stated).
notes: Enacts FGAP-042 per the approved plan (2026-07-02 session); D1 chain→DAG generalization user-approved at plan approval; archaeology basis in the session record (FGAP-042 user-directed 2026-06-06; follow-through LLM-omitted). Relation names as module constants; config-driven resolution named as future boundary.
